name: digital-marketing-pro
description: The most comprehensive open-source AI marketing plugin — 150 skills, 25 specialist agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow producing the Four Core Documents (61 explicit steps), Two-Views Model, Decision Matrix, Living Project Instruction File. Built for marketing agencies, in-house teams running 50–200 brands, and consultancies. Installs on **5 coding-agent surfaces** — Claude Code + Cowork (canonical), OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot CLI (auto-discovers `.claude-plugin/plugin.json`), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (experimental). EU AI Act Article 50 ready (C2PA content provenance signing end-to-end tested against c2pa-python 0.32, pre-publish gate blocks unsigned AI assets for EU campaigns, draft implementing guidelines from 8 May 2026 baked into compliance rules). 6-platform AEO/GEO audit including Google AI Mode (Gemini 3.5 Flash, ~1B MAUs, default conversational search since Google I/O 2026). 16 privacy-law jurisdictions (GDPR, CCPA, EU AI Act, DPDPA, LGPD, CASL, PIPEDA, UK GDPR + 8 more). 14 HTTP MCP connectors (Slack, HubSpot, Notion, Stripe, Gmail, Google Calendar, Ahrefs, SimilarWeb, Klaviyo, Amplitude, Canva, Figma, Asana, Webflow). 69 Python scripts (optional). 167 reference knowledge files. 10 top-level slash commands. v3.7.1 polish + discoverability pass with rewritten README and corrected asset counts. v3.7 added Copilot CLI + experimental Antigravity install surfaces. v3.6 added Codex + Cursor manifests. v3.5 May-2026-ecosystem refresh (AI Mode + Core Update + Article 50 draft + Meta Advantage+ Leads/Threads + Gemini Omni/Nano Banana Pro/Veo 3.1 + Claude Code v2.1.149+ /usage). MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside ContentForge and SocialForge.
